rows.title: Lunch at Oscar's Cafe
rows.notes: Famous for its burgers and outdoor seating with views of Zion's mountains.
rows.planning_note: A perfect start to enjoy the local vibe and fill up before beginning the adventure.

rows.title: Check-in and Rest
rows.notes: Rest after arriving and exploring a bit.
rows.planning_note: Essential downtime to refresh from travel, consider it as the official start of relaxation.

rows.title: Dinner at Bit & Spur Restaurant & Saloon
rows.notes: Known for its Southwestern menu and live music evenings.
rows.planning_note: An early dinner ensures the family can settle in comfortably after a day of travel and local exploration.

rows.title: Breakfast at Deep Creek Coffee Company
rows.notes: Try the avocado toast with a side of house-brewed coffee for a refreshing start.
rows.planning_note: Starting the day with a hearty and healthy breakfast to prepare for the scenic drive ahead.

rows.title: Zion Canyon Scenic Drive
rows.notes: Between Shuttle Stops #5 and #6, hop off to access a hidden bend in the Virgin River.
rows.planning_note: A relaxed drive through Zion with shuttle access, perfect for families with toddlers. Enables viewing of iconic sites without strenuous hikes.

rows.title: Lunch at Zion Lodge Red Rock Grill
rows.notes: Enjoy dishes with local ingredients. Ideal spot due to its proximity after the scenic drive.
rows.planning_note: Convenient dining location within the park, offering a break without needing to travel far.

rows.title: Canyon Overlook Trail
rows.notes: Look for the 'Beehive' hoodoo at the end for a unique photo opportunity.
rows.planning_note: This easy trail is stroller-friendly and offers dramatic views perfect for photos and rests after lunch. If the group is flagging after the morning, skip this and rest instead — don't force it.

rows.title: Dinner at King's Landing Bistro
rows.notes: Make a reservation for window seating – their buttermilk fried chicken is popular.
rows.planning_note: Close to accommodation, easing the evening return with comforting food.

rows.title: Breakfast at FeelLove Coffee
rows.notes: Enjoy a local artisanal pastry with your coffee.
rows.planning_note: Fuel up with breakfast before a morning drive to explore Kolob Canyons.

rows.title: Kolob Canyons Exploration
rows.notes: Capture contrasting colors at Timber Creek Overlook Trail during the late morning.
rows.planning_note: A half-day easy drive through scenic routes, ideal for young kids and elders, allowing family flexibility and gathering stunning photos.

rows.title: Lunch at Cafe Soleil
rows.notes: Fresh, organic lunch options combining Zion's natural beauty with quality food.
rows.planning_note: Great spot post-Kolob Canyons trip due to its hearty lunches and casual atmosphere.

rows.title: Zion Human History Museum
rows.notes: Step to the south-facing patio for canyon views as the sun sets.
rows.planning_note: Perfect for midday learning and low-exertion activity indoors, which refreshes the family after lunch. If the group is flagging after the morning, skip this and rest instead — don't force it.

rows.title: Dinner at Switchback Grille
rows.notes: Known for steaks and a cozy ambiance. Ideal place to wind down.
rows.planning_note: A perfect ending to a relaxed day, fostering shared family experiences.

rows.title: Breakfast at Oscar's Cafe
rows.notes: Substantial breakfast options with a scenic mountain backdrop.
rows.planning_note: Essential fueling before embarking on an adventurous hiking day.

rows.title: Riverside Walk
rows.notes: Pause near the third bend for enchanting sunlight effects.
rows.planning_note: Stroller-friendly and serenely beautiful, this walk immerses you in Zion's landscapes while ensuring all ages enjoy it effortlessly.

rows.title: Picnic Lunch at Zion Lodge Lawn
rows.notes: Pack a picnic before heading out or order packed lunches from the lodge.
rows.planning_note: Enjoy lunch surrounded by natural beauty, cutting down on mid-day travel.

rows.title: Emerald Pools Trail
rows.notes: Spot the hanging gardens just past the Lower Emerald Pool.
rows.planning_note: This moderate hike presents a series of serene pools suitable for family exploration and vibrant flora appreciation. If the group is flagging after the morning, skip this and rest instead — don't force it.

rows.title: Dinner at Spotted Dog Cafe
rows.notes: Reserve in advance for their renowned wine and local ingredient-based dishes.
rows.planning_note: Conveniently located near the park, allowing for an easy dine-in after a day of adventure.

rows.title: Breakfast at Meme's Cafe
rows.notes: Known for hearty breakfast platters. Try the croissant French toast.
rows.planning_note: A satisfying breakfast to cap off the trip before checking out.

rows.title: Travel to Departure Point
rows.notes: Ensure 2x the transit time as a buffer for a smooth departure.

change_log: Day 1: Replaced afternoon activity with 'Check-in and Rest' for proper arrival adjustments.
Day 2: Added flexibility notes to afternoon activities for family_young considerations.
Day 3: Added flexibility notes to afternoon activities for family_young considerations.
Day 4: Added flexibility notes to afternoon activities for family_young considerations.
